params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

params.SpellDescription: Roll X six-sided dice, where X is the number of Bobbleheads you control. Create a tapped Treasure token for each even result. If you rolled 6 exactly seven times, you win the game.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Roll X six-sided dice, where X is the number of Bobbleheads you control. Create a tapped Treasure token for each even result. If you rolled 6 exactly seven times, you win the game.
